creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #2)

Thanks for double checking and the new patch.
I don't think we had differences in the poudriere runs. The plist issue only occurs if I remove the dependency on opencv completely. In this case, the port builds fine in poudriere, but does not build the imagery_opencv module at all.
Essentially, it seems possible to have opencv as an OPTION and use plist substitution for the imagery_opencv module. You are certainly the better judge on whether this would be useful.

I ran a couple of builds with your latest patch, and it looks good. Thanks again for putting up with me :-)
